Uses of Interface
org.moeaframework.util.format.Displayable

Packages that use Displayable
Package
Description
org.moeaframework
Convenience classes for using the MOEA Framework.
org.moeaframework.algorithm
Implementations of various algorithms and support tools for working with algorithms.
org.moeaframework.analysis
Tools for analyzing the runtime and end-of-run behavior of algorithms.
org.moeaframework.analysis.collector
Collectors record information periodically during the execution of an algorithm.
org.moeaframework.core
Contains the core classes used by this framework.
org.moeaframework.core.fitness
Implementations of various fitness assignment methods.
org.moeaframework.core.indicator
Collection of unary quality indicators for comparing the quality of non-dominated approximation sets.
org.moeaframework.parallel
Support for distributed and parallel computing for optimization algorithms.
org.moeaframework.util
Collection of general-purpose utilities.
org.moeaframework.util.format
Classes for formatting data into a tabular format.

  • Uses of Displayable in org.moeaframework

    Classes in org.moeaframework that implement Displayable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Analyzer
    Performs basic end-of-run analysis.
    class 
    Analyzer.AnalyzerResults
    Stores the results produced by this analyzer.

  • Uses of Displayable in org.moeaframework.algorithm

    Classes in org.moeaframework.algorithm that implement Displayable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MSOPSRankedPopulation
    Population implementing the ranking scheme used by the Multiple Single Objective Pareto Sampling (MSOPS) algorithm.
    class 
    ReferencePointNondominatedSortingPopulation
    Implementation of the reference-point-based nondominated sorting method for NSGA-III.
    class 
    ReferenceVectorGuidedPopulation
    A reference vector guided population, for use with RVEA, that truncates the population using the method outlined in [1].

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DefaultEpsilons
    Provides ε values for algorithms and archives using ε-dominance.

    Observations

  • Uses of Displayable in org.moeaframework.core

    Classes in org.moeaframework.core that implement Displayable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AdaptiveGridArchive
    Adaptive grid archive.
    class 
    EpsilonBoxDominanceArchive
    A non-dominated population using an ε-box dominance comparator.
    class 
    NondominatedPopulation
    A population that maintains the property of pair-wise non-dominance between all solutions.
    class 
    NondominatedSortingPopulation
    Population that maintains the rank and crowdingDistance attributes for its solutions by invoking NondominatedSorting.evaluate(Population).
    class 
    Population
    A collection of solutions and common methods for manipulating the collection.
    class 
    Solution
    A solution to an optimization problem, storing the decision variables, objectives, constraints and attributes.

    Description

    FitnessBasedArchive
    Maintains a non-dominated archive of solutions with a maximum capacity.

  • Uses of Displayable in org.moeaframework.util.format

    Subinterfaces of Displayable in org.moeaframework.util.format
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    Formattable<T>
    Interface used by classes containing tabular data (think like a spreadsheet) that can be formatted and rendered in various ways.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    TabularData<T>
